qa_pairs.question: What are the layers of the I/O software and hardware stack?
qa_pairs.answer: The layers of the I/O software and hardware stack are I/O Hardware, Parallel filesystem, I/O Middleware, High-end I/O library, and Application.

qa_pairs.question: In the context of parallel I/O, what abstraction layers should be considered?
qa_pairs.answer: When organizing parallel I/O, several layers of abstraction should be kept in mind: I/O hardware, parallel file system, I/O middleware, high-end I/O library, and the application.

qa_pairs.question: What is the lowest layer of the I/O software and hardware stack?
qa_pairs.answer: The lowest layer of the I/O software and hardware stack is the I/O hardware.

qa_pairs.question: What does I/O hardware represent in a cluster's I/O stack?
qa_pairs.answer: I/O hardware represents the physical array or hard-disks attached to the cluster.

qa_pairs.question: Which component runs on top of the I/O hardware in the stack?
qa_pairs.answer: The parallel file system runs on top of the I/O hardware.
